title: i18next resource bundle (structural)
description: A faithful de-facto structural schema for an i18next / react-i18next JSON resource bundle. i18next has no official JSON Schema (the format is defined by library convention at https://www.i18next.com/misc/json-format), so this schema captures the recursive value shape the library reads: a JSON object whose leaf values are translation strings, and whose intermediate values are nested namespaces (objects). Arrays of strings are permitted because i18next supports array-valued keys (returnObjects / joinArrays). Plural sibling keys (key_one/key_other), context keys (key_male), nesting ($t(...)), and interpolation ({{var}}) are all ordinary string values under this schema — there is no key-name constraint, exactly as i18next imposes none. The purpose is to assert that a translated bundle remains a well-formed i18next resource object (no value collapsed to a number/bool, no key promoted to a non-object/non-string).
